message:
fix(db): cache safety, query bounds, search improvements, and index lock removal

Cache (cache.rs):
- Refactor get_inbox_stats_scoped() to avoid use-after-free from mutable borrow
- Simplify drain_touches_scoped() using retain() instead of manual iteration
- Fix unsafe truncation in cache test

Query safety (queries.rs):
- mark_all_messages_read_in_project(): explicitly count affected messages
  before UPDATE rather than trusting rows_affected() return value
- Add LIMIT 10000 to list_unacknowledged_messages() and
  list_overdue_unacknowledged_messages() to prevent DoS via unbounded results

S3FIFO cache (s3fifo.rs):
- Simplify remove() to O(1) by only removing from index; let queue eviction
  happen lazily instead of walking the queue

Search (search_planner.rs, search_two_tier.rs):
- Reduce max search limit from 100,000 to 5,000 to prevent DoS
- Fix empty plan logic to also trigger for faceted queries
- search_two_tier: fall back to full quality search when fast search returns
  no results instead of returning empty (improves recall)
- Fix has_quality flag in test data

Index writing (search_v3.rs):
- Remove global INDEX_WRITE_LOCK Mutex from three indexing functions; lock
  was unnecessary since each function uses its own Tantivy writer handle;
  improves concurrent indexing throughput

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
